data.title: Investors of Sprouts facing deadline. Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims. Contact James Wilson if suffered losses. Stock purchased between June 4, 2025, and October 29, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Sprouts to reach out to him directly for a potential discussion on their alternatives. If individuals bought or obtained securities in Sprouts within the period of June 4, 2025, to October 29, 2025, and are interested in exploring their options, they are encouraged to contact him.

data.title: Dr. Qicheng Zhang of Lowell Observatory captures first ground-based images of Comet 3I/ATLAS. 4.3-meter Lowell Discovery Telescope played a key role.
data.description: Astronomer Dr. Qicheng Zhang from Lowell Observatory successfully obtained the initial ground-based optical photographs of Comet 3I/ATLAS after its recent approach to the Sun. This achievement was made possible by utilizing the 4.3-meter Lowell Discovery Telescope in FLAGSTAFF, Arizona. The images offer a rare glimpse of the comet post its closest encounter with the Sun and provide valuable insights into its behavior. This groundbreaking observation showcases the remarkable capabilities of the telescope, emphasizing its unique low-horizon features. The event took place on December 11, 2025, marking a significant milestone in comet research.

data.title: Koala Insulation expands in Indianapolis, opens 6 new territories in $52 billion industry. Drive sustainable growth and local entrepreneurship.
data.description: An environmentally-friendly insulation company is set to expand its reach in Central Indiana by opening six new territories. This initiative aims to assist homeowners in reducing energy expenses, promote sustainable development, and support local entrepreneurship. The expansion plan reflects Koala Insulation's rapid growth as one of the country's fastest-growing franchises. The news was shared in Indianapolis on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Snow Secure's cutting-edge snow storage ensures early resort openings, praised by TIME and gaining strong growth.
data.description: Snow Secure, a disruptive technology, is revolutionizing early-season resort operations in North America. Following its recognition in TIME's Best Inventions 2025, the company is rapidly expanding. Based in Santa Fe, the innovation is proving to be a game-changer for the industry, with growing popularity and adoption rates.

data.title: Trump's tariffs narrow US trade deficit to $52.8B, lowest in 5 years. Exports surged to $289.3B, imports grew slower.
data.description: President Donald Trump has long advocated for using tariffs to address America's significant trade deficit. His stance seemed justified in September, as new data from the Census Bureau revealed that the U.S. trade deficit shrank to $52.8 billion for the month - the smallest gap since June 2020. This marked a substantial improvement from the revised $59.3 billion deficit in August and surpassed expectations of a $63.3 billion deficit. The surge in exports played a pivotal role in this development, with a 3% increase to $289.3 billion - the second-highest monthly figure on record. Notable growth areas included industrial supplies and materials, up $7.2 billion, nonmonetary gold, up $6.1 billion, consumer goods, up $4.1 billion, and pharmaceutical products, up $3.1 billion. However, there were declines in computer exports by $2.3 billion and U.S. service exports by $0.4 billion. The decrease in travel services by $0.6 billion and transport by $0.2 billion also somewhat offset the overall positive trend.

data.title: Canadian brand Baffin introduces ICE CREW (STP) men's boot tailored for first responders, ensuring comfort and safety.
data.description: New protective footwear called ICE CREW (SAFETY TOE & PLATE) designed for first responders is now offered by Canadian brand Baffin in Stoney Creek, ON. Launched on Dec. 11, 2025, these men's boots are crafted to provide comfort, durability, and safety for those in technical and emergency services. The ICE CREW boots are specialized with safety toe and plate features for enhanced protection.

data.title: Envestnet enhances platform for advisors with latest tech updates, modernizing portfolio management. Milestone year in 2025.
data.description: Envestnet, a prominent company in the WealthTech industry for financial advisors, showcased significant innovation in their latest quarterly tech updates announced on December 11, 2025. Operating out of BERWYN, Pa., they are known for their market-leading wealth management platform. The updates primarily focus on modernizing and expanding portfolio management capabilities. This move aims to enhance the user experience and keep up with technological advancements in the sector. With these developments, Envestnet continues to solidify its position as a key player in the industry by delivering cutting-edge solutions to financial advisors.

data.title: George Prendergast, PhD, from Lankenau Institute for Medical Research, elected to National Academy of Inventors for his work integrating academics and invention.
data.description: Renowned scholar George Prendergast, PhD, known for his pivotal role in intertwining academia and innovation at Lankenau Institute for Medical Research, has been recently chosen as a member of the prestigious National Academy of Inventors. The announcement was made in Wynnewood, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025. Dr. Prendergast's remarkable achievements in merging scholarly pursuits with inventive breakthroughs have been widely recognized, solidifying his place in the esteemed academy.

data.title: Tennessee Department of Correction partners with SigBee for employee engagement; pilot started in 2024.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, on December 11, 2025, the Tennessee Department of Correction (TDOC) announced an extension of its collaboration with SigBee, a top company specializing in employee engagement and workforce health technology. This partnership was broadened after a promising trial period initiated in 2024. This long-term strategic partnership aims to improve workforce well-being and efficiency within the TDOC.

data.title: a16z invests in Loops AI, leading Agentic Commerce, transforming customer engagement with autonomous agents.
data.description: In Istanbul, Agentic Commerce has introduced a groundbreaking concept where AI agents operate as independent sales, service, and marketing entities. These agents are capable of providing various services such as product suggestions, checkout aid, and post-sale follow-ups on multiple platforms including websites, WhatsApp, online marketplaces, and social media. At the forefront of this innovation is Loops AI, whose agents are revolutionizing customer interaction by converting it into a profitable avenue. These real-time agents autonomously adapt and improve based on brand-specific data, leading to enhanced customer engagement with the potential for increased revenue.

data.title: Todd Andre named President, Air Force & Navy Programs at M1 Support Services in Denton, TX. Leading executive for aligning M1 programs with business strategy.
data.description: In Denton, Texas, M1 Support Services revealed that Todd Andre has been appointed as the President overseeing Air Force and Navy Programs. In this newly assigned position, Mr. Andre will be responsible for offering executive guidance, strategic supervision, and operational management for all M1 Air Force and Navy initiatives. His main goals include ensuring top-notch performance, ongoing enhancements, and synchronization with M1’s enduring business plan. Todd's appointment comes after showcasing remarkable leadership and senior executive skills at M1, effectively advancing their competitive edge.

data.title: Cision acquires Trajaan, enhancing AI capabilities after partnership; strengthens consumer insights.
data.description: Cision, a prominent global provider of consumer and media intelligence, revealed its acquisition of Brandwatch and Trajaan in December 2025. This move extends the collaboration initiated by Brandwatch and Trajaan in August 2025, consolidating consumer, search, and generative AI insights within a unified ecosystem. The acquisition signifies a significant step in creating a comprehensive platform for insights, further enhancing the capabilities in this sector.

data.title: 24Petwatch Microchip Registry will move to PetPlace.com in 2026, offering unified pet services and care resources.
data.description: In a strategic collaboration, PetPlace has revealed that the 24Petwatch Microchip Registry will transition to PetPlace.com in 2026. This initiative aims to consolidate reliable microchip protection and lost pet services with specialized pet care resources on a single platform. The development, unveiled in New York on December 11, 2025, signals a significant advancement in pet wellness and security.

data.title: StoneTree Investment Partners invest in Reel Power International, a lower middle market industrial business, in Dec. 2025.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, StoneTree Investment Partners, a private equity firm specializing in lower middle market industrial companies, disclosed its latest investment in Reel Power International. The Company, based in [location], is a key player in [industry].

data.title: B&O Railroad Museum to unveil American Freedom Train No. 1 in 2026 for America 250 celebration, restoring iconic locomotive.
data.description: In Baltimore, the B&O Railroad Museum will reveal the restored American Freedom Train No. 1 (AFT No. 1) on January 12, 2026, in honor of America 250. This locomotive, a symbol of unity and patriotism during the 1975/76 U.S. Bicentennial, has been meticulously restored by the Museum as a national gift for the upcoming 250th anniversary celebration. Alongside the unveiling of AFT No. 1, a new exhibit highlighting the historic significance of the train will also be showcased.

data.title: Believe in Baseball Foundation to host "In the Spirit of the Game" awards dinner and auction in Los Angeles on Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: Los Angeles, December 11, 2025 - The inaugural "In the Spirit of the Game" event has been announced by The Perfect Game Believe in Baseball Foundation in collaboration with Chairman Rick Thurman and CEO Rob Ponger. This event aims to blend baseball and humor in an evening celebration.

data.title: Ampelis introduces CORE7, a whole-food supplement and lifestyle platform for preventive nutrition.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Highland, Utah on December 11, 2025, Ampelis introduced CORE7, a comprehensive nutritional supplement and behavior-change platform. The newly launched CORE7 aims to provide evidence-based nutrition and lifestyle assistance to the public. This initiative combines a variety of whole-food elements and a broad-spectrum approach to support overall well-being.

data.title: Billtrust extends streak as G2 AR software leader for 19 quarters, secures 35 badges in Winter 2026 report.
data.description: Billtrust, a company based in Hamilton Township, New Jersey, announced that it has achieved a notable achievement in G2's Winter 2026 Report by securing 35 badges for its AI-powered solutions. The company specializes in B2B accounts receivable (AR) workflow and payment software. The achievement marks a significant milestone for Billtrust, showcasing its continued dominance in the industry. The company's consistent performance has solidified its position as a leading provider in this sector, as evidenced by the recent recognition from G2.

data.title: Jet’s Pizza surpasses 10M AI orders, totaling $250M in sales. Growth seen in SMS ordering and phone bot programs.
data.description: Jet’s Pizza, a popular pizza shop recognized for its Detroit-Style Pizza, has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 10 million AI orders. This translates to over $250 million in AI sales. The SMS ordering program, OrderAI by HungerRush, in addition to phone bot programs from Converse Now and HungerRush, have seen consistent growth as customers increasingly prefer quick and convenient methods to place orders at Jet’s. The brand has always emphasized embracing digital ordering innovations to enhance customer experience and meet evolving preferences.

data.title: Five Star Painting advises on holiday home revamp in Waco. Leading painting franchise offers tips for interior projects.
data.description: Leading painting professionals in Waco, Texas have shared the top interior projects for a seasonal makeover. Five Star Painting®, a prominent residential and commercial painting franchise in North America, is advising property owners to consider these ideas.
